title: Trump's 'War Hero' Avatar Throws 'No More Mr Nice Guy' Warning At Iran
summary_full: For Washington, curbs on Tehran's nuclear programme are a red line in talks, but there is now mounting pressure on that line as Trump runs up against a deadline that could force his hand.
summary_public: For Washington, curbs on Tehran's nuclear programme are a red line in talks, but there is now mounting pressure on that line as Trump runs up against a deadline that could force his hand.
